title: Reviewer-contribution declaration — schema companion
description: JSON Schema for a capability's `review-contributions.yaml` (shipped at `.pkit/capabilities/<cap>/review-contributions.yaml`). Per project-management:DEC-032, a capability declares reviewer-contribution rules, each pairing a classification match-predicate with a required reviewer-agent name; pm collects them by walking the manifest-registered capabilities. The matching declaration in `schemas/` documents the format and is paired with this validator.

contributions.description: List of reviewer-contribution rules. An empty list is valid (a capability that ships the file but contributes nothing).

match.description: Classification match-predicate. Keys are classification axes (DEC-012); `workstream` is the axis specified at v1. A rule matches a closing issue when every key/value pair holds for that issue's classification.

workstream.description: Workstream-axis value(s) the rule matches on. A scalar string matches that one value; a list matches if the closing issue's `workstream` classification is ANY listed value (OR within the axis). Multi-axis predicates remain AND-composed.

reviewer.description: Required reviewer-agent name. Must correspond to a deployed agent file at `.claude/agents/<name>.md` (or wherever the harness deploys agents). Local-path only at v1 (per DEC-032 D2).
